hero.subheadline: Premium ceramic tableware for restaurants, hotels & fine dining.

about.label: Our Story
about.heading: Where Tradition Meets the Modern Table
about.p1: Cego Ceramics was born from a deep reverence for Thai artisanal craft. Every piece that leaves our kilns carries the weight of tradition—formed by skilled hands, fired with precision, and glazed with character.
about.p2: From intimate bistros to five-star dining rooms, our tableware elevates every meal into an experience. We believe the vessel is as important as what it holds.

collections.label: Our Collections
collections.heading: Crafted in Every Colour
collections.subheading: Explore our range of handcrafted ceramic tableware collections, each with its own story and character.

blueWhite.name: Blue & White
blueWhite.desc: Classic cobalt blue patterns inspired by centuries of ceramic tradition.

mattBrown.name: Matt Brown
mattBrown.desc: Earthy matte tones that evoke warmth, rustic charm, and natural beauty.

dustyIron.name: Dusty Iron
dustyIron.desc: Rustic iron-wash finish with organic texture and deep smoky tones.

twoTone.name: Two-Tone
twoTone.desc: Dual-glaze artistry where two worlds of colour meet in harmony.

brush.name: Brush Collection
brush.desc: Freehand painted brushstrokes that celebrate the joy of imperfection.

bpgp.name: BP & GP
bpgp.desc: Bold pearl and gold finishes — the choice for luxury tablescapes.

halfWhite.name: Half White
halfWhite.desc: Minimalist elegance through restrained form and pure bisque tone.

whitePearl.name: White Pearl
whitePearl.desc: Luminescent pure-white glaze that radiates light with every course.

catalog.label: Product Catalog
catalog.heading: Browse Our Full Range
catalog.subheading: Click any piece to view in detail. Filter by collection to find your perfect match.

whyCego.label: Why Cego
whyCego.heading: Built on Craft. Trusted by Professionals.
whyCego.subheading: We don't just make plates. We make the foundation of memorable dining experiences.

craft.title: Traditional Thai Craftsmanship
craft.desc: Every piece is shaped and glazed by skilled Thai artisans with decades of experience passed down through generations.

eco.title: Eco-Friendly Glazing Process
eco.desc: Our glazes use environmentally responsible compounds, minimising waste and reducing our carbon footprint at every stage.

safe.title: Food-Safe Certified
safe.desc: All Cego ceramics meet international food-safety standards — lead-free, cadmium-free, and safe for everyday professional use.

custom.title: Custom & OEM Available
custom.desc: From bespoke shapes to custom glaze colours and branded engravings — we bring your vision to life at scale.

export.title: Worldwide Export Ready
export.desc: We ship to hotels, restaurants and distributors across Asia, Europe and beyond, with reliable logistics partnerships.

durable.title: Durable Lead-Free Materials
durable.desc: High-fired stoneware and porcelain bodies built to withstand the demands of professional kitchens and dishwashers.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.heading: Let's Talk Ceramics
contact.subheading: Interested in our collections or a custom order? We'd love to hear from you.

footer.tagline: Ceramic artistry for the modern table.
